song.title: What Made You, Lord, to Die for Me
song.presentation: V1 C1 V2 C1 V3 C1 V4 C2 V5 C2
song.lyrics:
[C1] . F#m D What made You die for me? . A F#m I was Your enemy. . E A Lord, You became a curse for me. . F#m D O what a mystery! . A F#m My God, You died for me! . E A You died for me, Your enemy!
[C2] . F#m D Your love has conquered me, . A F#m Even Your enemy. . E A In love, dear Lord, You came to me. . F#m D Nothing could change me . A F#m But love and mercy. . E A Your love, dear Lord, has conquered me.
[V] .A F#m E A - F#m 1What made You, Lord, to die for me? 2I never thought that You would be 3You loved me Lord, so very long, 4I was a man who was just sin 5One little turn and You were there, . C#m E 1Why would You die for me, Your ene_my? 2So full of love and tender mer_cy. 3And with a love en_during and strong. 4Which issued in a life full of sins. 5Waiting for me with Your loving care. .A F#m D Bm 1You took my place to hang on a tree 2How could You love a person like me? 3Although I mocked and cursed You so long, 4My heart toward You was in rebel___lion, 5How could I still re_main Your ene_my . A F#m D A 1To be a curse, a curse for me. 2You loved me, dear Jesus, Your e___ne____my! 3You waited and prayed for me all along. 4But Lord, You touched me| with Your compassion. 5Your love, dear Jesus, dis_armed me.
